name: Genvor Inc
business: Genvor Inc. is a pioneer in AI-accelerated peptide technology for sustainable agriculture. The company develops and commercializes antimicrobial peptides, nutritionally enhanced peptides, and crop-enhancing peptides for crop protection and performance enhancement. It targets both conventional and organic agricultural markets, as well as animal health and nutrition applications.

exposures.sentence: The Company, through its wholly owned subsidiary Genvor Inc., is pioneering the development and commercialization of AI-accelerated peptide technology to address critical challenges in global agriculture.

catalysts.event: Revenue expected from licensing and distribution of topical spray and seed trait
catalysts.sentence: Genvor does not expect revenue until the end of 2025, through the licensing and distribution of either or both the topical spray and seed trait, utilizing licensing and royalty opportunities.

catalysts.event: Extension of CRADA for studies of 4th generation peptides (GV185 and GV187)
catalysts.sentence: Genvor is expecting an extension of the CRADA to continue the studies of Genvor's 4th generation of its peptides (GNV-185 and GNV-187) towards commercialization.

tamClaims.claim: $220 billion in annual global crop losses
tamClaims.sentence: targeting the estimated $220 billion in annual global crop losses attributed to plant diseases, pests, and environmental stressors.

tamClaims.claim: Global agricultural biologicals market $9.5 billion in 2019 growing to $19.7 billion by 2026
tamClaims.sentence: The global agricultural biologicals market was approximately $9.5 billion in 2019 and is expected to grow to approximately $19.7 billion by 2026.
